basic_details.job_title: IIFT Network Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Foreign Trade (IIFT) Network Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iift.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIFT Network Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/ B.Tech in Computer Science/ Computer Engineering/ Computer Technology/ Information Technology or M.Sc.(Computer Science) or MCA
qualification.details: B.E/ B.Tech in Computer Science/ Computer Engineering/ Computer Technology/ Information Technology or M.Sc.(Computer Science) or MCA.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIFT Network Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIFT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIFT Network Manager Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIFT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIFT Network Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: B.E/ B.Tech in Computer Science/ Computer Engineering/ Computer Technology/ Information Technology or M.Sc.(Computer Science) or MCA.

IIFT Network Manager Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIFT Network Manager Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIFT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIFT Network Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIFT Network Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIFT Network Manager position is 06-07-2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Network Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/ B.Tech degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Computer Technology, or Information Technology, or an M.Sc. in Computer Science, or an MCA degree to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Network Manager position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Network Manager post is between a minimum of 22 years and a maximum of 40 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Network Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Network Manager position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 70,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Network Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Network Manager post in the Indian Institute of Foreign Trade (IIFT) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIFT Network Manager recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIFT Network Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIFT Network Manager recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Network Manager post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Network Manager role at IIFT typically involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contract basis for the Network Manager role at the Indian Institute of Foreign Trade.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of IIFT is also provided there for your reference.
